_comment: aiUnit strategy config. ActiveStrategy picks the named strategy unless AIUNIT_STRATEGY env var overrides. Kind is one of: anthropic | openai-compatible | gemini | cli. For Kind=cli the harness shells out to the named Command (which authenticates against the operator's existing CLI subscription); for HTTP kinds it calls the API directly with an API key from ApiKeyEnvVar.

maf.Description: Internal Microsoft Agent Framework gateway. Fill BaseUrl + Model with the real endpoint before activating.

cline.Description: Cline-compatible OpenAI endpoint. Fill BaseUrl + Model before activating.

claude.Description: Claude Code CLI driven by the operator's existing Claude subscription, pinned to Sonnet 4.6 via --model. No API key required; the CLI handles auth.

claude-api.Description: Anthropic HTTP API fallback for environments without the Claude CLI. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to activate.

grok.Description: xAI Grok-4. Retained for parity with baseline.

codex.Description: OpenAI Codex CLI driven by the operator's existing ChatGPT subscription. Spawns 'codex exec --skip-git-repo-check <prompt>' with image attachments as file refs. No API key required; the CLI handles auth.

codex-api.Description: OpenAI HTTP API fallback for environments without the Codex CLI. Set OPENAI_API_KEY to activate.

gemini.Description: Google Gemini Generative Language API. Set GOOGLE_API_KEY to activate.
